title.en: Rivets and Blind Rivets Guide: Selection and Installation
title.zh: 铆钉和抽芯铆钉指南：选型和安装
title.es: Guía de Remaches y Remaches Cegados: Selección e Instalación
title.ar: دليل المسامير اللولبية والمسامير العمياء: الاختيار والتثبيت
title.fr: Guide des Rivets et Riv Aveugles: Sélection et Installation
title.pt: Guia de Rebites e Rebites Cegos: Seleção e Instalação
title.ru: Руководство по Заклёпкам и Глухим Заклёпкам: Выбор и Установка
title.ja: リベットとリトラクタブルリベットガイド：選定と取付け
title.de: Nieten und Blindnieten: Auswahl und Installation
title.hi: रिवेट्स और ब्लाइंड रिवेट्स गाइड: चयन और स्थापना

description.en: Complete guide to rivets and blind rivets. Learn about solid rivets, pop rivets, and how to select the right rivet for applications where bolts aren't suitable.
description.zh: 铆钉和抽芯铆钉完整指南。了解实心铆钉、抽芯铆钉以及如何为不适合螺栓的应用选择正确的铆钉。
description.es: Guía completa de remaches y remaches ciegos. Aprenda sobre remaches sólidos, remaches pop y cómo seleccionar el remache correcto.
description.ar: دليل شامل للمسامير اللولبية والمسامير العمياء. تعلم عن المسامير الصلبة ومسامير البوب وكيفية الاختيار الصحيح.
description.fr: Guide complet des rivets et rivets aveugles. Apprenez les rivets solides, les rivets pop et comment sélectionner le bon rivet.
description.pt: Guia completo de rebites e rebites cegos. Aprenda sobre rebites sólidos, rebites pop e como selecionar o rebite certo.
description.ru: Полное руководство по заклёпкам и глухим заклёпкам. Узнайте о сплошных заклёпках, вытяжных заклёпках и как выбрать правильную.
description.ja: リベットとリトラクタブルリベットの完全ガイド。ソリッドリベット、ポップリベット、そして適切なリベットの選択方法について学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Nieten und Blindnieten. Erfahren Sie mehr über Vollnieten, Popnieten und wie man das richtige Niet auswählt.
description.hi: रिवेट्स और ब्लाइंड रिवेट्स की पूर्ण गाइड। सॉलिड रिवेट्स, पॉप रिवेट्स, और बोल्ट के लिए उपयुक्त न होने वाले अनुप्रयोगों के लिए सही रिवेट कैसे चुनें।

keywords: rivets, blind rivets, pop rivets, solid rivets, rivet installation, rivet selection

body.en:
Different rivet types for different applications:

1. Solid Rivets:
- Traditional rivet requiring access to both sides
- Requires bucking bar for installation
- Highest strength for critical applications
- Used in: Structural, aerospace, shipbuilding

2. Pop Rivets (Blind Rivets):
- Installed from one side only
- Mandrel breaks off during installation
- Various materials: aluminum, steel, stainless
- Most common for general applications

3. Structural Blind Rivets:
- Higher strength than standard pop rivets
- Large flange for load distribution
- Used in: Automotive, transportation

4. Specialized Rivets:
- Drive rivets (single-sided)
- Rivet nuts (creates threads)
- Self-piercing rivets (for sheet metal)

Key factors for rivet selection:

1. Grip Range:
- Total thickness being joined
- Must fit within rivet grip range

2. Material:
- Aluminum rivets: Light weight, general use
- Steel rivets: Higher strength
- Stainless rivets: Corrosion resistance

3. Head Style:
- Dome head: Standard appearance
- Countersunk: Flush mount

4. Hole Size:
- Typically 0.1mm larger than rivet diameter
- Too tight = difficult installation
- Too loose = weak joint

cta.ja: リベット見積もりを依頼
